description.what: Write code the agent produces into the channel's bound Codespace, so the team can browse and edit it in the editor.
description.when_to_use: When asked to write or change code in a channel that has a bound codespace.
description.not_for: Running code (that's the runtime/terminal), or channels with no bound codespace.

inputs.name: path
inputs.doc: file path within the codespace, e.g. src/main.go

errors.when: the channel has no bound codespace
the file exceeds the codespace size cap

preconditions: the channel is bound to a codespace
steps: tag each code block with a file path
the connector writes each block to the codespace
postconditions: files appear in the Codespace editor for everyone

linux.resolve: connector writes via the room API

macos.resolve: connector writes via the room API

windows.resolve: connector writes via the room API
